channel.title: GitHub ZenScript Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of ZenScript in GitHub

item.title: pa1nki113r/Project_Brutality
item.description: This is the primary repository for collaborative efforts between Doom developers on Project Brutality. This is the bleeding-edge version that is constantly being developed on, and not meant in any way shape or form to be representative of the final version of the mod.

item.title: EnigmaticaModpacks/Enigmatica2Expert
item.description: The official repository and issue-tracker for the modpack Enigmatica 2: Expert for Minecraft 1.12.2

item.title: DarkPacks/SevTech-Ages
item.description: SevTech: Ages is a massive Minecraft modpack packed with content and progression.
